examples: The mattress I'm now sleeping on is saggy.
Daisy: Will you still love me when my skin grows old and saggy?
Collagen breakdown, which starts speeding up significantly around the age of 35, can leave your skin saggy.
Japan, meanwhile, has a saggy yen that is distorting world flows in both capital and commerce.
In addition, microbes hiding in saggy skin-folds can probably convert the iodine in surface mud into an absorbable form.
